📋 Repository Overview
This library contains 488 Functional Unit Test (FUT) scripts generated for the SAP S/4HANA Opus transformation program, covering all 244 approved CRDs.

Each CRD includes one Functional User Story and two FUT scripts: Script A validates the primary happy-path workflow, and Script B covers role-based access control, boundary conditions, and edge cases. Every test step contains both a positive expected result (system behaves correctly) and a negative expected result (system handles errors gracefully). Use the sidebar to navigate, the search bar to find CRDs instantly, or export any script as CSV.
